title: CCTV ONVIF Event Subscription Health and Reconnect Failures
app: Custom TA (NVR REST/syslog), ONVIF pull, Hikvision ISAPI HEC, or Milestone connector mapped to listed sourcetypes
spl:
index=physical sourcetype="onvif:events" earliest=-24h
| where match(lower(_raw), "(?i)renew|subscribe|disconnect|fault|http 401")
| stats count by pullpoint_endpoint camera_id
description: Stale ONVIF subscriptions silently stop analytics and alarm forwarding to VMS.
implementation: (1) Log client pull-point renewals. (2) Alert on auth failures. (3) Automate token rotation.
grandmaExplanation: We watch the physical data center for power, cooling, environment, and physical access.
knownFalsePositives: Sensor anomalies during cleaning, calibration, or planned environmental changes.
